subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in a hallowed and all-knowing tongue, and Who ordaineth for all contingent beings whatsoever He willeth through His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بلسان قدس علیم و یحکم علی الممکنات ما یشاء بامره لا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @power of the Manifestation of God
